mapper.insert: INSERT INTO im_sync_session ( id, sync_id, user_id, device_id, sync_type, sync_strategy, total_count, synced_count, current_batch, batch_size, sync_status, start_time, end_time, last_activity_time, error_message, sync_start_seq, sync_end_seq, last_synced_seq, create_time, update_time ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{syncId}, #{userId}, #{deviceId}, #{syncType}, #{syncStrategy}, #{totalCount}, #{syncedCount}, #{currentBatch}, #{batchSize}, #{syncStatus}, #{startTime}, #{endTime}, #{lastActivityTime}, #{errorMessage}, #{syncStartSeq}, #{syncEndSeq}, #{lastSyncedSeq}, #{createTime}, #{updateTime} )
mapper.update: UPDATE im_sync_session SET synced_count = #{syncedCount}, current_batch = #{currentBatch}, last_synced_seq = #{lastSyncedSeq}, last_activity_time = #{lastActivityTime}, update_time = #{updateTime} WHERE sync_id = #{syncId}
mapper.select: SELECT sync_id as syncId, sync_status as status, total_count as totalCount, synced_count as syncedCount, current_batch as currentBatch, (total_count - synced_count) as remainingCount, TIMESTAMPDIFF(SECOND, FROM_UNIXTIME(start_time/1000), NOW()) as durationSeconds FROM im_sync_session WHERE sync_id = #{syncId}
